name: Nacho Popcorn
recipeIngredient: 1/8 teaspoon Tabasco sauce, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Prepare a baking sheet by spraying with cooking spray.
3. Place the popped popcorn on the prepared baking sheet.
4. Toss the mixture of seasonings in a bowl until well combined for flavor.
5. Bake for 10 minutes, tossing once.
